happyThoughts.quote: I got a quick and accurate reply via email.
Thank you for the quick reply and great support!

turns.text: What specific Flex League topic can I help you with today? Please select one of the options below or type your question.
Joining a Flex League
To help you with joining a Flex League, could you please tell me your location (city and state) or the specific name of the Flex League you are interested in joining?
miami fl singles flex

To join the Miami, FL Singles Flex League, you can follow these steps:

1. Log in to your account [location].net.
2. Navigate to the **Flex Leagues** page.
3. Use the search filters to narrow down your search by **location** (enter Miami, FL) and **sports type** (Tennis or Pickleball).
4. Click on the specific Miami Flex League from the search results to view its page.
5. Click the **Register** button on the event page.
6. Select the Singles division you would like to play in and continue to payment.

Does this resolve your question, or is there anything else I can help you with?
I can help you with duplicate player profiles! To get started, which of the following best describes your situation?
My own duplicate profiles

Got it! I'll help you get your duplicate profiles merged.

Let me grab a few details. Could you share the following:

1. Your full name
2. Your location (city/state or country)
3. The profile links or player IDs for both profiles (if you have them — if not, the display names will work)
4. Which profile you'd like to keep as your primary
5. Your preferred account email address
Drew Cohen , Lincolnshire Illinois, preferred account is the one registered under email, [email]
Thanks, Drew! Do you have the profile links or player IDs for the two duplicate profiles? If not, just share the display names and I'll work with those.
They are both just Drew Cohen

No problem! Since both profiles share the same display name, the support team will be able to identify them by your email and location.

Before I submit the ticket, let me confirm the details:

Name: Drew Cohen
Location: Lincolnshire, Illinois
Duplicate profiles: Both listed as "Drew Cohen"
Preferred account email: [email]

Does everything look correct? Also, do you know which profile has your most recent match history or activity — that would help the team identify which one to keep as primary.
Keep the one under [email] as primary one please, thank you!
Perfect, I have everything I need. Let me submit this for you now!

Your support ticket has been submitted — your ticket number is #832955.

The support team will review your request and work on merging the duplicate "Drew Cohen" profile into your primary account at [email]. Just a heads up — the review process can take several business days, so please avoid creating any new accounts or making major changes to your profiles in the meantime.

Is there anything else I can help you with?
I'd be happy to help with Pro Tennis Tour (PTT) tournament and event questions! What do you need help with today?
Tournament Schedule
Let me look that up for you!

The Pro Tennis Tour Tournament Calendar lets you browse all PTT tournaments with a variety of filters to help you find what you're looking for, including:

- Gender (Men / Women)
- Date
- Region (Americas, Europe, Asia & Pacific)
- Country
- Surface (Grass, Clay, Hard, Carpet, Indoor/Outdoor)
- Status (Live, Upcoming, Registration Open, Complete)

You can visit the PTT Tournament Calendar on the UTR Sports website to view the full list of upcoming and ongoing tournaments.

Is there anything more specific you'd like to know, such as a particular region, surface type, or upcoming events?
where is the link to the calendar?

I'm sorry, I don't have the direct URL for the PTT Tournament Calendar in my available information. I'd recommend navigating to the UTR Sports website and looking for the Pro Tennis Tour section to find the calendar there.

Is there anything else I can help you with?
